title: Goblin Traders (Fabric)
description: An Unofficial Port of MrCrayfish's Goblin Traders Mod
body:
![HeaderLogo](https://i.imgur.com/wNhtYEs.png?raw=true)  ❗ This is an UNOFFICIAL FABRIC port of the mod! for the forge version, see - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders


WE HAVE MIGRATED!!!!
Visit Curseforge for the newest versions, Modrinth page will no longer be updated.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders-fabric





This is an unofficial port.
Due to this being an improvisation of MrCrayfish's original mod (he has no affiliation with this port, asset permission was granted), there is a lot of things that may differ slightly to the forge version, for example how Goblins spawn logic works, how they interact with weather events, ect... If there is any problems, or crashes that you find in the mod, feel free to send me the crash report on my discord: https://discord.gg/aSqn3mnU7C
📖 About: Goblin Traders is a simple mod that adds goblins which have unique trades. Goblins are found randomly around the world or in the nether and provide exclusive and beneficial trades that allow you to take your adventure to the next level! Goblin Traders adds two new traders, the Goblin Trader which is found in the overworld and the Vein Goblin Trader which is found in The Nether; both with their own unique set of trades. These little goblins have a little attitude and don't like it when you hit them (you monster!). ![Traders](https://imgur.com/l8IZ5fF.gif=100)
🍦 Don't like the trades that aren't vanilla-esc? There is a toggle for this in the config! Feel free to change it and it will push back all the levels of enchantments to vanilla-friendly trades.
📦 Modpack Developers: Goblin Traders has support for Cloth Config, and Mod Menu, feel free to configurate spawns, fall toggles, and other options in this config. Be aware that some of the options require a game (mod) refresh.
📷 Screenshots: ![S3](https://imgur.com/9JH1Rg4.png) ![S4](https://imgur.com/c6mqbA1.png) ![S5](https://imgur.com/Wt7yfzm.png)
